subject: sound_design

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Demonstrates high-level control and clarity in Location Sound Recording. Keep practising to achieve smoother consistent recordings.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Demonstrates high-level clarity in Recording & Editing Ambiences. Work towards decoding the individual layers of the ambience recordings.
refined: Sound Design: Demonstrates high-level clarity in Recording & Editing Ambiences. Work towards decoding the individual layers of the ambience recordings.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Demonstrates high-level clarity in Editing & Mixing Sound Elements using Sound Editing Software. Work towards achieving better mixes for more narrative impact.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Demonstrates high-level control and clarity in all the Semester I learning outcomes. Practice more with different raw materials across different genres.
refined: Sound Design: Demonstrates high-level control and clarity in all the Semester I learning outcomes. Practice more with different raw materials across different genres.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Shows good understanding in Human Auditory System. Focus on understanding the workings of the human ear more.
refined: Sound Design: Shows a good understanding of Human Auditory System. Advice to develop this further: observe everyday soundscapes daily and study how the ear perceives sound — this listening foundation underpins everything a sound designer does.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Shows good understanding in Properties and Behaviour of Sound & Aural Perception vs Microphone Behaviour. Actively analyse self hearing patterns.
refined: Sound Design: Shows a good understanding of Properties and Behaviour of Sound & Aural Perception vs Microphone Behaviour. Advice to develop this further: analyse how sound behaves around you and how it differs from what a microphone captures — this sharpens the critical listening the craft is built on.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Shows good understanding in Audio-Visual Relationships & Spatial and Temporal Relationships of Sound. Focus on understanding tonal perspectives of sounds with their corresponding visuals.
refined: Sound Design: Shows a good understanding of Audio-Visual Relationships & Spatial and Temporal Relationships of Sound. Advice to develop this further: study how sound and picture interact across space and time in scenes you admire to build an instinct for what a moment should sound like.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Shows good understanding and execution in Portable Audio Recording Devices. Practice with more recording sessions.
refined: Sound Design: Shows a good understanding of Portable Audio Recording Devices. Advice to develop this further: practise with more recording sessions and explore every feature of the recorders to build the muscle memory for fast, reliable field work.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Shows good understanding and execution in Location Sound Recording. Focus on getting the recording workflow more efficient.
refined: Sound Design: Shows a good understanding of Location Sound Recording. Advice to develop this further: practise mic placement and monitor levels on headphones across more sessions to capture the clean, consistent location tracks professionals rely on.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Shows good understanding and execution in Recording & Editing Ambiences. Aim for getting richer sound textures and cleaner recordings.
refined: Sound Design: Shows a good understanding of Recording & Editing Ambiences. Advice to develop this further: go on more recording trips and learn to decode the individual layers of an ambience to build richer textures and cleaner recordings.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Shows good understanding and execution in Editing & Mixing Sound Elements using Sound Editing Software. Focus on making the post-production workflow more efficient.
refined: Sound Design: Shows a good understanding of Editing & Mixing Sound Elements using Sound Editing Software. Advice to develop this further: practise regularly in the editing software and aim for cleaner, better-balanced mixes — this technical fluency is what gives a film narrative impact.

Advice to start with the fundamentals — preparing sound scripts, treatments and sound maps before the shoot; with consistent, guided practice, real improvement will follow.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Requires significant improvement in team collaboration and team spirit in Shoot and Post Production of a film project
refined: Sound Design: Team collaboration and team spirit in Shoot and Post Production project is a priority area to build from the ground up. Advice to start with the fundamentals — communicating clearly and contributing dependably within the sound team on every project; with consistent, guided practice, real improvement will follow.

subject: sound_design
original: Sound Design: Requires significant improvement in cultivating unique styles and innovations done by eminent Sound Designers
refined: Sound Design: Cultivating unique styles and innovations done by eminent Sound Designers is a priority area to build from the ground up. Advice to start with the fundamentals — developing both technical control and creative choices through repeated practice and feedback, and real improvement will follow.
